release_body_consistency.body_summary: Release governance checks, regression packs, adapter registries, CI checks, and deterministic evaluators are evidence-producing systems, not authorities.

not_authority_statement: Release proof automation may prepare auditable release evidence but must not approve releases, publish releases, accept risk, close audits, seal Decision Proof, or make final governance judgments.
sovereignty_statement: AAOS retains purpose and business intent, risk appetite, approval doctrine, identity trust chain, policy authority, decision router logic, escalation semantics, fail-closed policy, rollback policy, final risk classification, Decision Proof sealing logic, audit final judgment, and final governance authority.
